product.name: Oleex 3-Pack Stone Dish Drying Mat Set Includes 1 Large 24”x16” & 2 Small 4”x9” for Kitchen Counter-Collapsible Diatomaceous Earth Pad Absorbs Water & Dries Dishes Fast, Non-slip, Odor-Resistant Mats
features: 3 FAST-DRYING DISH MATS - Three mats, triple the power. Each pad absorbs 150% of its weight in moisture and dries water in seconds. The result? Crisp, clean surfaces without that damp towel odor. No puddles or funky smells—just gorgeous counters that practically sparkle

BUILT TO LAST - All the durability of stone, none of the bulk. Crafted from porous diatomites and recycled paper, you get the strength of rock without the weight. Tough, feather-light and impossibly airy, our diatomaceous earth mats power through splashes and spills, day after day.

FOLDS FOR EASY STORAGE - Our dish drying mats are too gorgeous to hide (but we’ve made them simple to stash, anyway). Just roll them up and tuck into drawers or cabinets. When style calls, they pop open in seconds, ready to show off and soak up every last drop.

SO EASY TO CLEAN - Designer look, effortlessly low maintenance. Our luxurious marble-style drying mats are surprisingly easy to clean. When oil or soap builds up, simply buff the surface with the included sandpaper. Fresh, flawless and ready for their next round of dishes.

NOT JUST FOR KITCHENS - Our stone mats don’t just do dishes. They do it all! The large 24”×16″ size doubles as a bath mat, while the two 4”×9″ minis make stylish drip pads for succulents or skincare setups. With endless possibilities, what will you use them for?
